visual_description: A man in a blue plaid shirt stands with his arms spread wide and looks down. A woman with dark curly hair lies in a hospital bed wearing a patterned gown and pink blanket while a hand places a brown leather bag beside her. The scene widens to reveal the man standing next to the bed, a nurse in light scrubs nearby, and another patient in a separate bed in the background.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible, containing only faint background sounds.
